posts.author: YuvalAp (Yuval Apeloig )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone,
Our product team just opened a new Ask an Expert thread on Reddit - all about AI Blocks.
Tal from the monday.com team will be there answering questions, sharing examples, and hearing your feedback.

If you’ve been trying it out or just want to learn what’s possible, this is a great place to chat directly with the team.
Join the conversation here
